scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; [ -n "$RENDER" ] && exit 0; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: cd artifacts/chat-app && npm install && NODE_ENV=production PORT=3000 BASE_PATH=/ npm run build
scripts.dev:workspace: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
